Name: Average time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to be followed by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time until Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission is performed after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Total resolution time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in variants that include reviewer assignment phases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and the end of case where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurs

Name: Time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that eventually reach SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Elapsed time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission when it appears multiple times consecutively in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between the last occurrence of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the first occurrence of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that result in acceptance
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission relative to the overall cycle time of cases that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Average waiting time to Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in complex submission paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in variants with repeated co-author account creation events
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in resubmission trajectories
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Elapsed time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in accepted manuscripts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
